.               .                    23     6     
ID              grade                23     7     
:=              :=                   23     13    
ID              c                    23     16    
;               ;                    23     17    
IF              if                   24     5     
ID              i                    24     8     
<               <                    24     10    
ID              j                    24     12    
THEN            then                 24     14    
WRITE           write                25     9     
(               (                    25     14    
ID              i                    25     15    
)               )                    25     16    
ELSE            else                 26     5     
WRITE           write                27     9     
(               (                    27     14    
ID              j                    27     15    
)               )                    27     16

;               ;                    28     7     
WHILE           while                29     5     
ID              i                    29     11    
<               <                    29     13    
INTC            10                   29     15

ID              i                    30     9     
:=              :=                   30     11    
ID              i                    30     14    
+               +                    30     16    
INTC            1                    30     18

(               (                    32     10

)               )                    32     12
